title: Syrian Fritters with Bouncy Twist
description: A delicious twist on traditional Syrian fritters, featuring a bouncy and light ingredient for a unique taste experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine Syrian flour, Light cheese, and Bouncy ingredient.
Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Add Fritters mix and mix until a dough forms.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of dough into the oil.
Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
